Innate Abilities, Weirdness & Mutations

You are an undying horror.
Your melee attacks drain, slow and weaken victims.
You can torment nearby foes to heal from their wounds.
You are immune to unholy pain and torment.
You cannot drink.
You recover more slowly from Doom and Banes.
Your demonic aura causes all spilled blood to erupt in flames.
(When seriously injured, your blood forms very thick armour. (AC +0))
Spells you cast and wands you use may paralyse nearby enemies.
Your presence sometimes corrodes or deforms those you injure.
You can speak a Word of Chaos.
Your touch may irresistibly damage your foes and sap their willpower.
You are agile. (Dex +4, Str/Int -1)
A shield forms around you when casting spells or using Invocations. (SH +7)

Message History

You kill the ufetubus!
The ufetubus disappears in a puff of smoke!
The demonspawn warmonger is lightly wounded.
Your corrupting presence corrodes the sin beast!
The sin beast is heavily wounded.
You kill the ufetubus!
The ufetubus disappears in a puff of smoke!
The demonspawn corrupter is moderately wounded.
The reaper twists and deforms.
The reaper is moderately wounded.
You kill the ynoxinul!
The ynoxinul disappears in a puff of smoke!
The ufetubus disappears in a puff of smoke! x4
The deep elf blademaster is moderately wounded.
The deep elf high priest twists and deforms.
The deep elf high priest is moderately wounded.
The deep elf high priest is heavily wounded.
The large abomination is heavily damaged.
The zykzyl twists and deforms.
The zykzyl is lightly wounded.
The green death is moderately wounded.
The orange crystal statue is severely damaged.
The shadow demon is no longer moving slowly.
The shadow demon is no longer weakened. The sin beast completely misses you.
The sin beast tramples you.
* * * LOW HITPOINT WARNING * * *
You hold your ground!
The guardian sphinx mutters an ancient curse at you.
Something smites you!
* * * LOW HITPOINT WARNING * * *
The obsidian statue attempts to bespell you!
You resist with almost no effort. The sin beast bites you.
* * * LOW HITPOINT WARNING * * *
You feel your power leaking away.
The sin beast tramples you!
* * * LOW HITPOINT WARNING * * *
You hold your ground!
The demonspawn warmonger hits you with a +3 demon whip of electrocution!!
You die...
Your body crumbles into a pile of gold.
